DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Erin M. Connell, Esq. of ORRICK HERRINGTON & SUTCLIFFE 773-5969, appearing for defendants/moving parties Pacific Exchange, Inc. and PCX Equities, Inc.
Stephanie Rubinoff, Esq. of HOROWITZ & RUBINOFF 510/444-7717, appearing for plaintiff/opposing party Pamela Precciely

RULING:
A R G U E D; the Court adopted its Tentative Ruling: DEFENDANTS PACIFIC EXCHANGE, INC. and PCX EQUITIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: Demurrer as to 3rd cause of action -- Overruled; 5th cause of action -- sustained with 10 days leave to amend; 6th cause of action -- Overruled; 7th cause of action -- sustained without leave to amend; 10th cause of action -- Sustained with 10 days leave to amend. Defendants' motion to strike as to 4 cause of action -- Denied; 8th cause of action -- Sustained with 10 days leave to amend; 9th cause of action -- Granted re: language "and who were misclassified" and ending with word "employees"; Denied as to references to 17200'; granted as to Paragraph 80 references to attorney's fees. Prevailing party is to prepare an order.(301/JLW/DM) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton CSR #1558.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2005 Continued To Sep-22-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT MODIFIED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.
